home.heroBody: Register tasks quickly and objectively, manage projects with Kanban and always be prepared for the next meeting.
home.footer: DailyTracker — Built to simplify your workflow.

kanban.title: Visual Kanban
kanban.description: Organize tasks in Planned, In Progress and Done columns with intuitive drag & drop.

filters.title: Smart Filters
filters.description: Filter by project, task type and date range to find exactly what you need.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: Analyze your productivity, generate daily summaries and identify bottlenecks with integrated AI.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.emptyFieldsError: Please fill in email and password.

register.subtitle: Create your account
register.heroBody: Organize your dailies, simplify your day and keep everything under control.
register.registerError: Registration error. The email may already be in use.

confirmModal.defaultBody: Are you sure you want to continue?
confirmModal.deleteTaskBody: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.
confirmModal.logoutBody: Are you sure you want to log out?

projects.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete the project "{{name}}"? All tasks and types associated with it will need to be reassigned or will be lost.

taskTypes.emptyFieldsError: Please fill in the name and select a project.
taskTypes.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete the type "{{name}}"? Tasks using this type will not be deleted, but will lose the association.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.setupTitle: Set up your Gemini API Key
aiChat.setupBody: Visit Google AI Studio to get your key.
aiChat.removeKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your API Key?
aiChat.chatEmpty: Ask about your tasks, projects or productivity.

reports.emptyState: No data for the selected period

welcome.title: Welcome to DailyTracker!
welcome.body: Let's take a quick 30-second tour. You can skip at any time.

sidebar.title: Navigation sidebar
sidebar.body: Here you switch between views, manage projects and task types, access reports and open the AI assistant.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.body: You have a personal workspace by default. Create new workspaces to collaborate as a team and invite people to join.

projects.title: Projects and task types
projects.body: Click "Projects" to create color-coded projects. Each project can have its own task types.

new-task.title: Creating a task
new-task.body: Click "+ New Task" (or press Enter) to quickly create a task. It appears on the Kanban board instantly.

kanban.title: Your Kanban board
kanban.body: Tasks flow through three columns: Planned, In Progress and Done.

drag-drop.title: Drag and drop
drag-drop.body: Drag any card and drop it into another column to change its status. You can also reorder within the same column.

done.title: All set!
done.body: That's everything you need to know to get started. Create your first task now!

summary.title: Daily Summary
summary.noTasks: No tasks yet. Create your first!
summary.emptySection: No tasks in this section with the active filters.

api.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet.
api.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
api.internalServerError: Internal server error. Please try again later.
